caption: The video shows an outdoor excavation site with red earth, where a large yellow and grey Volvo excavator is operating. Several people are present; one person in a blue shirt and dark pants stands near the machinery, while another in a tan shirt and blue jeans walks toward the excavator's bucket. In the background, a group of people stands on a higher ridge overlooking the pit. The "peoples dispatch" logo appears in the upper left corner throughout. A white rectangular overlay appears across the middle of the scene, containing a small circular icon and the text "HUMAN RIGHTS". As the sequence progresses, additional text appears within this white box, reading "Congo mines must end on-site confinement, civil society groups say". The excavator remains in a similar position, and the people's movements are subtle as the scene unfolds across the frames.
